meta.title: #BeADeepLearner like Macit Giray Gokirmak with DeepLearning.AI
meta.description:
“Before I learned about Deep Learning Specialization, I was an ordinary engineer working on test automation, backend, and frontend applications. After I completed DLS in 2018, I learned many things, including where I could look for essential issues during project planning and how to act upon them. This high-level knowledge helped me get a promotion at my company. The return on investment from this Specialization was fantastic. I highly recommend you check it out.”

Looking to grow your skills and build a career in AI? Join 1 million+ learners and #BeADeepLearner with the Deep Learning Specialization, a foundational online program by machine learning pioneer Andrew Ng. Read how learners like Macit and others took the next step in their AI journey: https://www.deeplearning.ai/program/deep-learning-specialization/?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=dls-jan21&course_id=dls-2
